name: fix-codex-retry-loop
description: Diagnose and repair Windows proxy configuration behind repeated Codex retry and reconnecting loops.

interface.shortDescription: Safely repair Codex proxy settings on Windows
interface.longDescription: Detect Windows proxy listeners, distinguish network failures from authentication responses, and update Codex proxy settings only after explicit confirmation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Fix Codex Retry Loop to diagnose repeated Codex retry or reconnecting errors on Windows.
